executiveSummary: Core UI exists but milestone criteria are only partially evidenced; testing and deployment gaps require human review.

securityFindings: Auth gates appear present; cannot verify production hardening from evidence pack.
documentationReview: README is brief; env setup incomplete.
testingReview: Few or no tests for payout-critical paths.
recommendations: Add payout tests and attach a Testnet deposit explorer link
reviewerNotes: Prefer MANUAL_REVIEW over APPROVE due to unverified criteria.
